item.title: Django REST API Developer Needed — Hourly Contract
item.description:
Django REST API Developer Needed — Hourly Contract
Budget: $40.00/hr - $60.00/hr
Job Type: Hourly
Experience Level: Intermediate

We are looking for a Django REST Framework developer to extend our existing API. Tasks include adding new endpoints, fixing bugs, writing tests, and improving documentation.

Skills: Python, Django, Django REST Framework, PostgreSQL, Docker
Country: Canada
